next_step.current_state: Found all relevant April 2026 invoices containing the target service line. Sum is 780 + 390 = 1170.

next_step.observation: Read invoice INV-0011 dated 2026-04-27; it contains the line item "checklist rewrite and rollout pack" with line_eur 390.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files for 50_finance and 50_finance/invoices, and relied on exact invoice records.
function.outcome_justification: The invoice dated 2026-04-21 shows the target line item at 780 EUR, and the invoice dated 2026-04-27 shows the same target line item at 390 EUR; both are since the beginning of April 2026, totaling 1170 EUR.
